subcodes.first_line: O thou who art gladdened by the appearance of the Covenant! The pavilion of glory hath been raised upon the loftiest summits of the horizons and is established [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استبشر بظهور المیثاق قد انتصب خباء المجد علی اعلی قلل الافاق و استقر
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant
